meaning: n.昏晕,昏倒adj.虚落地,衰弱的,软弱的,无力的,微弱的,暗淡的,模糊的vi.昏晕,昏倒,变得微弱,变得没气力
examples: The heat made him feel faint.
His ears caught a faint cry.
Later, as night fell, I could hear the faint sound of avalanches on the distant mountains.
And there is a faint possibility that it will lead to much more than that.
